scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,hub,rush -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:hub" "npm run dev:rush-run"
scripts.dev:hub: concurrently -n hub-vite,electron -c cyan,yellow "vite --config apps/hub/vite.config.js --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 && electron apps/hub"
scripts.test: node --test packages/shared/tests/*.test.js apps/api/src/tests/*.test.js apps/web/src/*.test.js apps/hub/src/tests/*.test.js apps/rush-run/src/*.test.js
scripts.build: node --check apps/api/src/server.js && vite build --config apps/web/vite.config.js && vite build --config apps/hub/vite.config.js && vite build --config apps/rush-run/vite.config.js && node --check apps/hub/src/main/main.js
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build
